---
title: "RNA_DGE"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)
```

```{r Setting the Enviroment}

#loading libraries
library("tidyverse")
library("readxl")
library("readr")
library("ggrepel")
library("ggfortify")
library("patchwork")
library("eulerr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("ggVennDiagram")
library("ggrastr")
library("edgeR")
library("limma")
library("ggsignif")
library("dplyr")
library("purrr")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
# install.packages(c("knitr", "BiocManager"))
# BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")



#Loading R Objects Other WorkflowR

RNA_fc <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_fc.RDS")
RNA_fc_No5 <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_fc_No5.RDS")
RNA_fc_No4 <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_fc_No4.RDS")
ann_colors <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/ann_colors.RDS")
RNA_Metadata_NoRep <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/RNA_Metadata_NoRep.RDS")
RNA_Metadata_No4_NoRep <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/RNA_Metadata_No4.RDS")
RNA_Metadata_No5_NoRep <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/RNA_Metadata_No5.RDS")

Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_No4.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoD5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_No5.RDS")
Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc.RDS")
Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_No4.RDS")
Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_No5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_No5.RDS")
Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_fc <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_fc.RDS")
Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_fc_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_fc_No4.RDS")
Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_fc_No5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_fc_No5.RDS")

#Loading R Objects This WorkflowR
dge_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/dge_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
design_int_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/design_int_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
Species_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
Trajectory_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoR <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoR.RDS")
Trajectory_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
Interaction_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/Interaction_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
Interaction_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/Interaction_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")

Species_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")

Trajectory_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoR_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoR_No4.RDS")
Trajectory_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4 <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
```

```{r Volcano_Plot_Function,Result="Hide",warning=FALSE, include = FALSE}
generate_volcano_plot <- function(toptable, title) {
  
  # #check for entrezid 
  # if(!"Entrez_ID" %in% colnames(toptable)) stop("Entrez_ID col not present")
  # 
  #make significance labels
  
  toptable <- toptable %>% 
    mutate(Significance = case_when(
      logFC > 0 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
      logFC < 0 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
      TRUE  ~ "Not Significant"
    ))
  
  #factor significance
  toptable$Significance <- factor(
    toptable$Significance, 
    levels = c("Upregulated", 
               "Not Significant", 
               "Downregulated")
  )
  
  #count genes in each category
  upgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Upregulated")
  nsgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Not Significant")
  downgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Downregulated")
  
  
  #labels for legend
  legend_lab <- c(
    paste0("Upregulated: ", upgenes),
    paste0("Not Significant: ", nsgenes),
    paste0("Downregulated: ", downgenes)
  )
  
  #colors 
  color_map <- c("Upregulated" = "blue",
                 "Not Significant" = "grey30",
                 "Downregulated" = "red")
  
  #generate volcano plots
  p <- ggplot(toptable, aes(x = logFC, 
                            y = -log10(P.Value),
                            color = Significance)) +
    geom_point_rast(alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_map, 
                       labels = legend_lab,
                       breaks = c("Upregulated",
                                  "Not Significant", 
                                  "Downregulated"))  +
    xlim(-20,20) +
    labs(title = title, 
         x = expression("log"[2]*"FC"),
         y = expression("-log"[10]*"p-value")) +
    # theme_custom() +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  return(p)
}


```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_species <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day4","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Species DEG FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig_No4, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_species_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {
  
  comparison_colors <- c(
  HvC_Day0  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day0"]),
  HvC_Day2  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day2"]),
  HvC_Day5  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day5"]),
  HvC_Day15 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day15"]),
  HvC_Day30 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day30"])
)

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

 p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = comparison_colors) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab(" ") +
  ylab("logFC") +
  ggtitle(
    paste0(
      cluster_name,
      " Species DEG FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
      signif(kw$p.value, 3)
    )
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectroy DEG FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectroy DEG FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_interaction <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Interaction DEGs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_interaction_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Interaction DEGs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day4","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$absfc,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Species DEGs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  comparison_colors <- c(
  HvC_Day0  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day0"]),
  HvC_Day2  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day2"]),
  HvC_Day5  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day5"]),
  HvC_Day15 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day15"]),
  HvC_Day30 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day30"])
)

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$absfc,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = comparison_colors) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab(" ") +
  ylab("absfc") +
  ggtitle(
    paste0(
      cluster_name,
      " Species DEG absfc Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
      signif(kw$p.value, 3)
    )
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

  return(p)
}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_trajectory <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$absfc,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectory DEGs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_trajectory_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$absfc,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectory DEGs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig_No4, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_absfc_sig_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")
  
  # Global test across comparisons
  kw <- kruskal.test(AbsFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)
  
  pw_kw <-pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$AbsFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH")
  
  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = AbsFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("AbslogFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " RNA AbsFC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)


}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig_No5, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_absfc_sig_No5 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day415","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day415","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")
  
  # Global test across comparisons
  kw <- kruskal.test(AbsFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)
  
  pw_kw <-pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$AbsFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH")
  
  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = AbsFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("AbslogFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " RNA AbsFC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)


}
```

```{r get_directional_genes, include = FALSE}

get_fc_directions <- function(traj_label, coef_name, comparison_label,
                              top_table_all, fit_obj, p_cutoff = 0.05, gene_set = NULL) {

  # ---------------------------
  # trajectory FC data
  # ---------------------------
  df_fc <- top_table_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      Comparisons %in% c(
        paste0("H_", comparison_label),
        paste0("C_", comparison_label)
      )
    )

  df_dir <- df_fc %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Species = ifelse(grepl("^H_", Comparisons), "H", "C")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Gene, Species) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Species, values_from = logFC) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(H), !is.na(C)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # KEY FILTER: DEGs in BOTH species
  # ---------------------------
  if (!is.null(gene_set)) {
    df_dir <- df_dir %>%
      dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_set)
  }

  # ---------------------------
  # direction classification
  # ---------------------------
  df_combo <- df_dir %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      direction = dplyr::case_when(
        H > 0 & C < 0 ~ "H_pos_C_neg",
        H < 0 & C > 0 ~ "H_neg_C_pos",
        H > 0 & C > 0 ~ "Both_pos",
        H < 0 & C < 0 ~ "Both_neg",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      ),
      direction_group = dplyr::case_when(
        H * C > 0 ~ "Same_direction",
        H * C < 0 ~ "Opposite_direction",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      )
    )

  # ---------------------------
  # output
  # ---------------------------
  list(
    all = df_combo,
    H_pos_C_neg = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "H_pos_C_neg"),
    H_neg_C_pos = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "H_neg_C_pos"),
    Both_pos = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Both_pos"),
    Both_neg = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Both_neg"),

    Same_direction = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction_group == "Same_direction"),
    Opposite_direction = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction_group == "Opposite_direction"),

    Other = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Other"),

    n_sig = length(gene_set)
  )
}
```

```{r get_directional_genes_HvC, include = FALSE}

get_fc_directions_HvC <- function(traj_label, coef_name, comparison_label,
                                 top_table_all, fit_obj, p_cutoff = 0.05) {

  # ---------------------------
  # DE genes
  # ---------------------------
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = coef_name, number = Inf)

  sig_tt <- tt %>%
    dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < p_cutoff) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # HvC FC data
  # ---------------------------
  df_fc <- top_table_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == comparison_label) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # classify direction
  # ---------------------------
  df_combo <- df_fc %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(sig_tt, by = "Gene") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      logFC.x > 0 ~ "Human_higher",
      logFC.x < 0 ~ "Chimp_higher",
      TRUE ~ "No_difference"
    ),
    magnitude = abs(logFC.x)
  )

  # ---------------------------
  # output
  # ---------------------------
  list(
    all = df_combo,
    Human_higher = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Human_higher"),
    Chimp_higher = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Chimp_higher"),
    n_sig = nrow(sig_tt)
  )
}
```

```{r get_directional_genes_HvC, include = FALSE}

get_fc_directions_HvC <- function(traj_label, coef_name, comparison_label,
                                 top_table_all, fit_obj, p_cutoff = 0.05) {

  # ---------------------------
  # DE genes
  # ---------------------------
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = coef_name, number = Inf)

  sig_tt <- tt %>%
    dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < p_cutoff) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # Interaction FC data
  # ---------------------------
  df_fc <- top_table_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == comparison_label) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # classify direction
  # ---------------------------
  df_combo <- df_fc %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(sig_tt, by = "Gene") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      logFC.x > 0 ~ "Human_higher",
      logFC.x < 0 ~ "Chimp_higher",
      TRUE ~ "No_difference"
    ),
    magnitude = abs(logFC.x)
  )

  # ---------------------------
  # output
  # ---------------------------
  list(
    all = df_combo,
    Human_higher = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Human_higher"),
    Chimp_higher = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Chimp_higher"),
    n_sig = nrow(sig_tt)
  )
}
```


```{r go_enrichment}
Enrich_Go_sets <- function(gene_sets, v) {

  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(dplyr)

  # -----------------------------
  # Universe (FIXED)
  # -----------------------------
  background_genes <- rownames(v$E) %>%
    sub("\\..*", "", .)

  # -----------------------------
  # GO helper
  # -----------------------------
  run_go <- function(genes) {

    genes <- unique(sub("\\..*", "", genes))

    if (length(genes) < 10) return(NULL)

    ego <- enrichGO(
      gene          = genes,
      universe      = background_genes,
      OrgDb         = org.Hs.eg.db,
      keyType       = "ENSEMBL",
      ont           = "BP",
      readable      = TRUE
    )

    if (is.null(ego)) return(NULL)

    as.data.frame(ego)
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Run for each gene set
  # -----------------------------
  results <- lapply(gene_sets, function(df) {
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
    run_go(df$Gene)
  })

  return(results)
}
```

####Unfiltered

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_Data}
counts_table <- RNA_fc
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_NoRep

counts_table_NoRep <- counts_table %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

metadata$dgelist <- c(rep(c("Human_Day0","Human_Day2","Human_Day4","Human_Day5","Human_Day15","Human_Day30","Chimp_Day0","Chimp_Day2","Chimp_Day4","Chimp_Day5","Chimp_Day15","Chimp_Day30"),7))

#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_table_NoRep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$dgelist)
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
dge$samples

dim(dge)
# saveRDS(dge, "data/DGE/dge_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
dge$samples

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data = metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

# saveRDS(dge, "data/DGE/dge_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
# saveRDS(design_int, "data/DGE/design_int_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_Data_Model, fig.height=6,fig.width=6}
dge <- dge_RNA_fc_NoRep
design_int <- design_int_RNA_fc_NoRep
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_NoRep

# Step 1: voom first
v1 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE)

# saveRDS(v1,"data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans_PerDay/v1_RMG0_PerDay_All.RDS")

# Step 2: estimate duplicate correlation on voom-transformed data
corfit <- duplicateCorrelation(v1, design_int, block = metadata$Individual)
corfit.correlation <- corfit$consensus.correlation

# Step 3: voom again including correlation
v2 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE,
           block = metadata$Individual,
           correlation = corfit.correlation)

# Step 4: fit linear model
fit <- lmFit(v2, design_int, block = metadata$Individual, correlation = corfit.correlation)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))
day <- metadata$Timepoint
plotDensities(v2, col = pal[as.numeric(day)], legend = FALSE)

human_idx <- metadata$Species == "H"
chimp_idx <- metadata$Species == "C"

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))

# Human
plotDensities(
  v2[, human_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Human")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[human_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(human_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

# Chimp
plotDensities(
  v2[, chimp_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Chimp")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[chimp_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(chimp_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

species_levels <- unique(metadata$Species)
day_levels <- unique(metadata$Timepoint)

for (sp in species_levels) {
  for (day in day_levels) {

    idx <- metadata$Species == sp &
           metadata$Timepoint == day

    if (sum(idx) > 0) {

      cols <- rainbow(sum(idx))

      plotDensities(
        v2[, idx],
        col = cols,
        main = paste(sp, day),
        legend = FALSE,
        axes = FALSE
      )

      axis(1)
      axis(2)
      mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

      legend(
        "right",
        legend = metadata$Individual[idx],
        col = cols,
        lty = 1,
        cex = 0.7
      )
    }
  }
}

```


####RLCPM_G1_4SpTp

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_Data}
counts <- Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_NoRep

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

metadata$dgelist <- c(rep(c("Human_Day0","Human_Day2","Human_Day4","Human_Day5","Human_Day15","Human_Day30","Chimp_Day0","Chimp_Day2","Chimp_Day4","Chimp_Day5","Chimp_Day15","Chimp_Day30"),7))

#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$dgelist)
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
dge$samples

dim(dge)
dge$samples

metadata$Species <- factor(
  metadata$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

 metadata$Timepoint <- factor(
   metadata$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data =  metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

# Step 1: voom first
v1 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE)

# Step 2: estimate duplicate correlation on voom-transformed data
corfit <- duplicateCorrelation(v1, design_int, block = metadata$Individual)
corfit.correlation <- corfit$consensus.correlation

# Step 3: voom again including correlation
v2 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE,
           block = metadata$Individual,
           correlation = corfit.correlation)

# Step 4: fit linear model
fit <- lmFit(v2, design_int, block = metadata$Individual, correlation = corfit.correlation)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))
day <- metadata$Timepoint
plotDensities(v2, col = pal[as.numeric(day)], legend = FALSE)

human_idx <- metadata$Species == "H"
chimp_idx <- metadata$Species == "C"

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))

# Human
plotDensities(
  v2[, human_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Human")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[human_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(human_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

# Chimp
plotDensities(
  v2[, chimp_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Chimp")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[chimp_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(chimp_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

species_levels <- unique(metadata$Species)
day_levels <- unique(metadata$Timepoint)

for (sp in species_levels) {
  for (day in day_levels) {

    idx <- metadata$Species == sp &
           metadata$Timepoint == day

    if (sum(idx) > 0) {

      cols <- rainbow(sum(idx))

      plotDensities(
        v2[, idx],
        col = cols,
        main = paste(sp, day),
        legend = FALSE,
        axes = FALSE
      )

      axis(1)
      axis(2)
      mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

      legend(
        "right",
        legend = metadata$Individual[idx],
        col = cols,
        lty = 1,
        cex = 0.7
      )
    }
  }
}


# saveRDS(dge, "data/DGE/dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
# saveRDS(design_int, "data/DGE/design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
# saveRDS(v1,"data/DGE/v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
# saveRDS(fit, "data/DGE/fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_Data_Model}
fit <- fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
design_int <- design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(

  # Species differences
  HvC_Day0  = SpeciesH,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  HvC_Day4  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  HvC_Day5  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  HvC_Day15 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  HvC_Day30 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30,
  
  #Trajectory differences
  H_Day02 = TimepointDay2 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day24 = TimepointDay4 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay4 - TimepointDay2 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day45 = TimepointDay5 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay4 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  H_Day515 = TimepointDay15 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  H_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  C_Day02 = TimepointDay2,
  C_Day24 = TimepointDay4 - TimepointDay2,
  C_Day45 = TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay4,
  C_Day515 = TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5,
  C_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15,
  
  # True interaction tests trajectory
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay4 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  
  levels = design_int
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

plotSA(fit2, main = "RNA Model")

results_summary <- decideTests(fit2,
                               adjust.method = "BH",
                               p.value = 0.05)
summary(results_summary)

# saveRDS(fit2, "data/DGE/fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_TopTable}
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

#Create Human TopTable. using listapply, then you can pull specific comp using the $
TopTables_RNA_names <- colnames(fit2$coefficients) 

TopTable_RNA_All <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(TopTables_RNA_names,function(ct) {
    
    tt <- topTable(
      fit2,
      coef = ct,
      number = Inf,
      sort.by = "p"
    )
    
    #add identifiers
    tt$Gene <- rownames(tt)
    tt$Comparisons <- ct
    
    tt
  })
)

ComparisonNames <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Comparisons)

# saveRDS(TopTable_RNA_All, "data/DGE/TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
# saveRDS(ComparisonNames, "data/DGE/ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

head(TopTable_RNA_All)
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_TopTable_VolcancoPlots}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

# Calculate global axis limits
x_limits <- range(TopTable$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
y_limits <- range(-log10(TopTable$P.Value), na.rm = TRUE)

plot <- list()

for (n in ComparisonNames) {
  data_n <- TopTable %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == n)
  
  plot[[n]] <- generate_volcano_plot(data_n, n) +
    ggplot2::xlim(x_limits) +
    ggplot2::ylim(y_limits)
}

# Print plots
for (n in ComparisonNames) {
  print(plot[[n]])
}
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_TopTable_Subsetting0.05}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

RNA_sets <- map(
  ComparisonNames,
  ~ {
    df <- TopTable %>%
      filter(Comparisons == paste0(.x))

    list(
      DEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05),
      NonDEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val >= 0.05)
    )
  }
)


names(RNA_sets) <- paste0(ComparisonNames)

# saveRDS(RNA_sets, "data/DGE/RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
```

#####Species

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_FC, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}

TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Species <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day4","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15",
    "HvC_Day30"
  ))

SpeciesD0_genes <- unique(c(RNA_sets$HvC_Day0$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD2_genes <- unique(c(RNA_sets$HvC_Day2$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD4_genes <- unique(c(RNA_sets$HvC_Day4$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD5_genes <- unique(c(RNA_sets$HvC_Day5$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD15_genes <- unique(c(RNA_sets$HvC_Day15$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD30_genes <- unique(c(RNA_sets$HvC_Day30$DEGs$Gene))

cluster_lists <- list(
 HvC_Day0  = SpeciesD0_genes,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesD2_genes,
  HvC_Day4  = SpeciesD4_genes,
  HvC_Day5  = SpeciesD5_genes,
  HvC_Day15  = SpeciesD15_genes,
 HvC_Day30  = SpeciesD30_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Directionality}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

Species_DEG_info <- list(
  HvC_Day0 = list(coef = "HvC_Day0", comp = "HvC_Day0"),
  HvC_Day2 = list(coef = "HvC_Day2", comp = "HvC_Day2"),
  HvC_Day4 = list(coef = "HvC_Day4", comp = "HvC_Day4"),
  HvC_Day5 = list(coef ="HvC_Day5", comp = "HvC_Day5"),
 HvC_Day15 = list(coef = "HvC_Day15", comp = "HvC_Day15"),
 HvC_Day30 = list(coef = "HvC_Day30", comp = "HvC_Day30")
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(Species_DEG_info), function(name) {

    info <- Species_DEG_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions_HvC(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable,
      fit_obj = fit2
    )

  }),
  names(Species_DEG_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Species_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Directionality_FC}

TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
direction_results <-Species_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Species <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day4","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15",
    "HvC_Day30"
  ))

aa <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$Human_higher$Gene)
ac <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ba <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$Human_higher$Gene)
bc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ca <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day4$all$Gene)
cb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day4$Human_higher$Gene)
cc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day4$Chimp_higher$Gene)

da <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$all$Gene)
db <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$Human_higher$Gene)
dc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ea <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$Human_higher$Gene)
ec <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$Chimp_higher$Gene)

fa <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$all$Gene)
fb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$Human_higher$Gene)
fc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$Chimp_higher$Gene)


cluster_lists <- list(
  HvC_Day0_all = aa,
  HvC_Day0_HumanHigher = ab,
  HvC_Day0_ChimpHigher = ac,
  
  HvC_Day2_all = ba,
  HvC_Day2_HumanHigher = bb,
  HvC_Day2_ChimpHigher = bc,
  
  HvC_Day4_all = ca,
  HvC_Day4_HumanHigher = cb,
  HvC_Day4_ChimpHigher = cc,
  
  HvC_Day5_all = da,
  HvC_Day5_HumanHigher = db,
  HvC_Day5_ChimpHigher = dc,
  
  HvC_Day15_all = ea,
  HvC_Day15_HumanHigher = eb,
  HvC_Day15_ChimpHigher = ec,
  
  HvC_Day30_all = fa,
  HvC_Day30_HumanHigher = fb,
  HvC_Day30_ChimpHigher = fc
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_EnrichGo}
v <- v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep


# all_go_results <- lapply(names(direction_results), function(traj) {
# 
#   res <- direction_results[[traj]]
# 
#   gene_sets <- list(
#     All = res$all,
#     Human_higher = res$Human_higher,
#     Chimp_higher    = res$Chimp_higher
#   )
# 
#   go <- Enrich_Go_sets(gene_sets, v)
# 
#   return(go)
# })
# 
# names(all_go_results) <- names(direction_results)


# saveRDS(all_go_results, "data/DGE/Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

```


#####Trajectory

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_FC, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}

TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

Traj02_genes <- intersect(RNA_sets$H_Day02$DEGs$Gene,RNA_sets$C_Day02$DEGs$Gene)
Traj24_genes <- intersect(RNA_sets$H_Day24$DEGs$Gene,RNA_sets$C_Day24$DEGs$Gene)
Traj45_genes <- intersect(RNA_sets$H_Day45$DEGs$Gene,RNA_sets$C_Day45$DEGs$Gene)
Traj515_genes <- intersect(RNA_sets$H_Day515$DEGs$Gene,RNA_sets$C_Day515$DEGs$Gene)
Traj1530_genes <- intersect(RNA_sets$H_Day1530$DEGs$Gene,RNA_sets$C_Day1530$DEGs$Gene)

length(Traj02_genes)
length(Traj24_genes)
length(Traj45_genes)
length(Traj515_genes)
length(Traj1530_genes)

cluster_lists <- list(
 Traj02_genes  = Traj02_genes,
  Traj24_genes  = Traj24_genes,
  Traj45_genes  = Traj45_genes,
  Traj515_genes  = Traj515_genes,
  Traj1530_genes  = Traj1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig_trajectory(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Directionality}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep


traj_info <- list(
  Traj02_genes = list(coef = "H_Day02", comp = "Day02"),
  Traj24_genes = list(coef = "H_Day24", comp = "Day24"),
  Traj45_genes = list(coef = "H_Day45", comp = "Day45"),
  Traj515_genes = list(coef ="H_Day515", comp = "Day515"),
 Traj1530_genes = list(coef = "H_Day1530", comp = "Day1530")
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(traj_info), function(name) {

    info <- traj_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable,
      fit_obj = fit2,
      gene_set = cluster_lists[[name]]
    )

  }),
  names(traj_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Trajectory_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoR.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Directionality_FC}

TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
direction_results <- Trajectory_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoR

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

aa <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ac <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ad <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
ae <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
af <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
ag <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ba <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
bc <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
bd <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
be <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
bf <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
bg <- unique(direction_results$Traj24_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)


ca <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$all$Gene)
cb <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
cc <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
cd <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
ce <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
cf <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
cg <- unique(direction_results$Traj45_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

da <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$all$Gene)
db <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
dc <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
dd <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
de <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
df <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
dg <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Both_neg$Gene)

ea <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ec <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ed <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
ee <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
ef <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
eg <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Traj02_All = aa,
  Traj02_HumanPos = ab,
  Traj02_ChimpPos = ac,
  Traj02_Both_pos = ad,
  Traj02_Both_neg = ae,
  Traj02_Same_direction = af,
  Traj02_Opposite_direction = ag,
  
  Traj24_All = ba,
  Traj24_HumanPos = bb,
  Traj24_ChimpPos = bc,
  Traj24_Both_pos = bd,
  Traj24_Both_neg = be,
  Traj24_Same_direction = bf,
  Traj24_Opposite_direction = bg,
 
  Traj45_All = ca,
  Traj45_HumanPos = cb,
  Traj45_ChimpPos = cc,
  Traj45_Both_pos = cd,
  Traj45_Both_neg = ce,
  Traj45_Same_direction = cf,
  Traj45_Opposite_direction = cg,
 
  Traj515_All = da,
  Traj515_HumanPos = db,
  Traj515_ChimpPos = dc,
  Traj515_Both_pos = dd,
  Traj515_Both_neg = de,
  Traj515_Same_direction = df,
  Traj515_Opposite_direction = dg,
 
  Traj1530_All = ea,
  Traj1530_HumanPos = eb,
  Traj1530_ChimpPos = ec,
  Traj1530_Both_pos = ed,
  Traj1530_Both_neg = ee,
  Traj1530_Same_direction = ef,
  Traj1530_Opposite_direction = eg
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Traj)
})

names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_EnrichGo}
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
v <- v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

# all_go_results <- lapply(names(direction_results), function(traj) {
# 
#   res <- direction_results[[traj]]
# 
#   gene_sets <- list(
#     H_pos_C_neg = res$H_pos_C_neg,
#     H_neg_C_pos = res$H_neg_C_pos,
#     Both_pos    = res$Both_pos,
#     Both_neg    = res$Both_neg,
#     Same_direction = res$Same_direction,
#     Opposite_direction = res$Opposite_direction,
#     All = res$all
#   )
# 
#   go <- Enrich_Go_sets(gene_sets, v)
# 
#   return(go)
# })
# 
# names(all_go_results) <- names(direction_results)


# saveRDS(all_go_results, "data/DGE/Trajectory_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

all_go_results <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep


H_comp <- "H_Day02"
C_comp <- "C_Day02"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(RNA_sets$H_Day02$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(RNA_sets$C_Day02$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_4_2}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep


H_comp <- "H_Day24"
C_comp <- "C_Day24"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(RNA_sets$H_Day24$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(RNA_sets$C_Day24$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_5_4}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

H_comp <- "H_Day45"
C_comp <- "C_Day45"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(RNA_sets$H_Day45$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(RNA_sets$C_Day45$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_15_5}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep


H_comp <- "H_Day515"
C_comp <- "C_Day515"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(RNA_sets$H_Day515$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(RNA_sets$C_Day515$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_30_15}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep


H_comp <- "H_Day1530"
C_comp <- "C_Day1530"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(RNA_sets$H_Day1530$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(RNA_sets$C_Day1530$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r Trajectory plotting }
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

df_all <- TopTable %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  
  mutate(
    species = ifelse(str_starts(Comparisons, "H_"), "H", "C"),
    trajectory = str_remove(Comparisons, "^[HC]_")
  ) %>%
  
  group_by(Gene, species, trajectory) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  
  pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from = logFC) %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(H), !is.na(C))

library(ggplot2)

df_all$trajectory <- df_all$trajectory <- factor(
  df_all$trajectory,
  levels = c("Day02", "Day24", "Day45", "Day515","Day1530")
)

ggplot(df_all, aes(x = H, y = C, color = trajectory)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # one regression line per trajectory (same color as points)
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE)+
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Human logFC",
    y = "Chimp logFC",
    color = "Trajectory",
    title = "All Trajectories Combined"
  )

df_stats <- df_all %>%
  group_by(trajectory) %>%
  do({
    fit <- lm(C ~ H, data = .)
    data.frame(
      r2 = summary(fit)$r.squared,
      p = summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
    )
  })
```


#####Interactions

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interaction_FC}

TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

TopTable_RNA_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

Inter_02_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_24_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_45_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_515_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_1530_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530$DEGs$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter_02_genes  = Inter_02_genes,
  Inter_24_genes  = Inter_24_genes,
  Inter_45_genes  = Inter_45_genes,
  Inter_515_genes  = Inter_515_genes,
  Inter_1530_genes  = Inter_1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interaction_Directionality}
TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

traj_info <- list(
  InterTraj02 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02", comp = "Day02"),
  InterTraj24 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24", comp = "Day24"),
  InterTraj45 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45", comp = "Day45"),
  InterTraj515 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515", comp = "Day515"),
  InterTraj1530 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530", comp = "Day1530")
)

cluster_lists <- list(
  InterTraj02  = Inter_02_genes,
  InterTraj24  = Inter_24_genes,
  InterTraj45  = Inter_45_genes,
  InterTraj515 = Inter_515_genes,
  InterTraj1530 = Inter_1530_genes
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(traj_info), function(name) {

    info <- traj_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable,
      fit_obj = fit2,
      gene_set = cluster_lists[[name]]
    )

  }),
  names(traj_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Interaction_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interaction_Directionality_FC}

TopTable <- TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
ComparisonNames <- ComparisonNames_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
RNA_sets <- Interaction_Directions_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_RNA_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

aa <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ac <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ad <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$Both_pos$Gene)
ae <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$Both_neg$Gene)
af <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$Same_direction$Gene)
ag <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj02$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ba <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
bc <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
bd <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$Both_pos$Gene)
be <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$Both_neg$Gene)
bf <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$Same_direction$Gene)
bg <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj24$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ca <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$all$Gene)
cb <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
cc <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
cd <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$Both_pos$Gene)
ce <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$Both_neg$Gene)
cf <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$Same_direction$Gene)
cg <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj45$Opposite_direction$Gene)

da <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$all$Gene)
db <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
dc <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
dd <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$Both_pos$Gene)
de <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$Both_neg$Gene)
df <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$Same_direction$Gene)
dg <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj515$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ea <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ec <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ed <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$Both_pos$Gene)
ee <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$Both_neg$Gene)
ef <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$Same_direction$Gene)
eg <- unique(RNA_sets$InterTraj1530$Opposite_direction$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter02_All = aa,
  Inter02_HumanPos = ab,
  Inter02_ChimpPos = ac,
  Inter02_Both_pos = ad,
  Inter02_Both_neg = ae,
  Inter02_Same_direction = af,
  Inter02_Opposite_direction = ag,
  
  Inter24_All = ba,
  Inter24_HumanPos = bb,
  Inter24_ChimpPos = bc,
  Inter24_Both_pos = bd,
  Inter24_Both_neg = be,
  Inter24_Same_direction = bf,
  Inter24_Opposite_direction = bg,
  
  Inter45_All = ca,
  Inter45_HumanPos = cb,
  Inter45_ChimpPos = cc,
  Inter45_Both_pos = cd,
  Inter45_Both_neg = ce,
  Inter45_Same_direction = cf,
  Inter45_Opposite_direction = cg,
  
  Inter515_All = da,
  Inter515_HumanPos = db,
  Inter515_ChimpPos = dc,
  Inter515_Both_pos = dd,
  Inter515_Both_neg = de,
  Inter515_Same_direction = df,
  Inter515_Opposite_direction = dg,
  
  
  Inter1530_All = ea,
  Inter1530_HumanPos = eb,
  Inter1530_ChimpPos = ec,
  Inter1530_Both_pos = ed,
  Inter1530_Both_neg = ee,
  Inter1530_Same_direction = ef,
  Inter1530_Opposite_direction = eg
  
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_interaction(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interaction_EnrichGo}
fit2 <- fit2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep
v <- v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep

# all_go_results <- lapply(names(direction_results), function(traj) {
# 
#   res <- direction_results[[traj]]
# 
#   gene_sets <- list(
#     H_pos_C_neg = res$H_pos_C_neg,
#     H_neg_C_pos = res$H_neg_C_pos,
#     Both_pos    = res$Both_pos,
#     Both_neg    = res$Both_neg,
#     Same_direction = res$Same_direction,
#     Opposite_direction = res$Opposite_direction,
#     All = res$all
#   )
# 
#   go <- Enrich_Go_sets(gene_sets, v)
# 
#   return(go)
# })
# 
# names(all_go_results) <- names(direction_results)
# saveRDS(all_go_results, "data/DGE/Interaction_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

all_go_results <- readRDS("data/DGE/Interaction_go_results_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep.RDS")

```




####RLCPM_G1_4SpTp No4

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_Data}
counts <- Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_No4
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No4_NoRep

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

metadata$dgelist <- c(rep(c("Human_Day0","Human_Day2","Human_Day5","Human_Day15","Human_Day30","Chimp_Day0","Chimp_Day2","Chimp_Day5","Chimp_Day15","Chimp_Day30"),7))

# #create DGEList object
# dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
# dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$dgelist)
# dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
# dge$samples

dge < -readRDS("data/DGE/dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")

dim(dge)
dge$samples

metadata$Species <- factor(
  metadata$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

 metadata$Timepoint <- factor(
   metadata$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data =  metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

# # Step 1: voom first
# v1 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE)
# 
# # Step 2: estimate duplicate correlation on voom-transformed data
# corfit <- duplicateCorrelation(v1, design_int, block = metadata$Individual)
# corfit.correlation <- corfit$consensus.correlation
# 
# # Step 3: voom again including correlation
# v2 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE,
#            block = metadata$Individual,
#            correlation = corfit.correlation)

v2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/v2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")

# # Step 4: fit linear model
# fit <- lmFit(v2, design_int, block = metadata$Individual, correlation = corfit.correlation)
# fit <- eBayes(fit)

fit <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))
day <- metadata$Timepoint
plotDensities(v2, col = pal[as.numeric(day)], legend = FALSE)

human_idx <- metadata$Species == "H"
chimp_idx <- metadata$Species == "C"

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))

# Human
plotDensities(
  v2[, human_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Human")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[human_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(human_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

# Chimp
plotDensities(
  v2[, chimp_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Chimp")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[chimp_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(chimp_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

species_levels <- unique(metadata$Species)
day_levels <- unique(metadata$Timepoint)

for (sp in species_levels) {
  for (day in day_levels) {

    idx <- metadata$Species == sp &
           metadata$Timepoint == day

    if (sum(idx) > 0) {

      cols <- rainbow(sum(idx))

      plotDensities(
        v2[, idx],
        col = cols,
        main = paste(sp, day),
        legend = FALSE,
        axes = FALSE
      )

      axis(1)
      axis(2)
      mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

      legend(
        "right",
        legend = metadata$Individual[idx],
        col = cols,
        lty = 1,
        cex = 0.7
      )
    }
  }
}


# saveRDS(dge, "data/DGE/dge_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(design_int, "data/DGE/design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(v1,"data/DGE/v1_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(v2,"data/DGE/v2_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(fit, "data/DGE/fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Differential_Data_Model}
fit <- fit_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4
design_int <- design_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4


contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(

  # Species differences
  HvC_Day0  = SpeciesH,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  HvC_Day5  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  HvC_Day15 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  HvC_Day30 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30,
  
  #Trajectory differences
  H_Day02 = TimepointDay2 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day25 = TimepointDay5 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay2 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day515 = TimepointDay15 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  H_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  C_Day02 = TimepointDay2,
  C_Day25 = TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay2,
  C_Day515 = TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5,
  C_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15,
  
  # True interaction tests trajectory
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  
  levels = design_int
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

plotSA(fit2, main = "RNA Model")

results_summary <- decideTests(fit2,
```
